description_long: This information point consists of a three-walled booth structure with large, high-resolution printed panels featuring scenic outdoor imagery and promotional text. The main front panel displays a panoramic landscape with a hiker overlooking a turquoise lake, accompanied by the branding 'WILDTHING' and the slogan 'EXPLORE THE WORLD.' The side panels feature a tall lighthouse on a rocky coast and another landscape, creating an immersive visual experience. The structure is set on a textured, stone-like ground surface, suggesting placement in a public or urban environment. The panels appear to be made of rigid, smooth materials, likely composite or laminated board, supported by a sturdy frame. The overall design is clean and modern, with a focus on visual impact and clear information delivery.
description: A modern, three-walled information booth with large scenic graphics and promotional text, set on a stone-textured base. The structure features high-resolution landscape imagery and branding, designed for public engagement.
description_view_0: The front view shows the main information panel with a panoramic landscape, branding, and text, flanked by two side walls with additional scenic graphics.
description_view_1: The left side view highlights a large image of a lighthouse on a rocky coast, with part of the interior landscape visible.
description_view_2: The rear view displays the back of the main panel, with the landscape image partially visible through a geometric overlay pattern.
description_view_3: The right side view shows the lighthouse image on the interior wall and a mostly blank exterior side panel.
attribute_facade_detailing: The facade features large, seamless printed panels with high-resolution photographic imagery and minimalistic branding. The visual detailing is dominated by bold landscape graphics and clean, uninterrupted surfaces, with no visible ornamentation or relief.
